name: connect_info
description: Get self-discovery info: accessible wallets, policies, capabilities, and AI-ready prompt. Call this first to understand your environment.

name: get_wallet_info
description: Get wallet info including chain, address, environment, and available networks.

name: get_address
description: Get the public address of the wallet.

name: get_balance
description: Get the current balance of the wallet.

name: get_assets
description: Get all assets (native + tokens) held by the wallet.

name: send_token
description: Send SOL/ETH or tokens from the wallet.

name: approve_token
description: Approve a spender to transfer tokens on your behalf. Requires APPROVED_SPENDERS policy.

name: call_contract
description: Call a whitelisted smart contract. Requires CONTRACT_WHITELIST policy.

name: encode_calldata
description: Encode smart contract calldata from ABI function signature and arguments.

name: sign_message
description: Sign an arbitrary message with the wallet private key.

name: sign_transaction
description: Sign an arbitrary transaction without broadcasting.

name: simulate_transaction
description: Simulate a transaction without executing it. Returns policy tier, estimated fees, balance changes, and warnings.

name: send_batch
description: Send multiple instructions in a single atomic transaction (Solana only).

name: get_tokens
description: Get registered tokens (builtin + custom) for a specific network.

name: resolve_asset
description: Resolve a CAIP-19 asset identifier to token metadata.

name: get_policies
description: Get policies applied to the wallet. Shows spending limits, whitelists, rate limits, and other rules.

name: list_sessions
description: List active sessions with pagination. Admin operation requiring master auth.

name: list_transactions
description: List transaction history with cursor-based pagination.

name: get_transaction
description: Get details of a specific transaction by ID.

name: list_nfts
description: List NFTs owned by the wallet.

name: get_nft_metadata
description: Get metadata for a specific NFT.

name: transfer_nft
description: Transfer an NFT to another address.

name: list_incoming_transactions
description: List incoming transactions received by the wallet.

name: get_incoming_summary
description: Get summary of incoming transactions for the wallet.

name: get_nonce
description: Get a nonce for owner wallet signature verification.

name: list_credentials
description: List external credentials stored in the wallet vault.

name: list_offchain_actions
description: List available off-chain actions for the wallet.

name: get_provider_status
description: Get Smart Account provider status: provider name, supported chains, gas sponsorship status.

name: build_userop
description: Build an ERC-4337 UserOperation for smart account execution.

name: sign_userop
description: Sign and submit an ERC-4337 UserOperation.

name: x402_fetch
description: Fetch a resource using x402 payment protocol.

name: wc_connect
description: Connect to a dApp via WalletConnect.

name: wc_status
description: Get WalletConnect session status.

name: wc_disconnect
description: Disconnect WalletConnect session.

name: get_rpc_proxy_url
description: Get the authenticated EVM RPC proxy URL for direct JSON-RPC access.

name: erc8004_get_agent_info
description: Get ERC-8004 agent identity info (on-chain ID, wallet, URI, metadata).

name: erc8004_get_reputation
description: Get ERC-8004 agent reputation summary.

name: erc8004_get_validation_status
description: Get ERC-8004 validation request status.

name: erc8128_sign_request
description: Sign an HTTP request with ERC-8128 for verified agent identity.

name: erc8128_verify_signature
description: Verify an ERC-8128 signed HTTP request.

name: waiaas_get_defi_positions
description: Get DeFi lending positions with health factor and USD amounts.

name: waiaas_get_health_factor
description: Get lending health factor (safe/warning/danger/critical).

name: waiaas_hl_get_positions
description: Get Hyperliquid perpetual positions for a wallet.

name: waiaas_hl_get_open_orders
description: Get Hyperliquid open orders for a wallet.

name: waiaas_hl_get_markets
description: Get Hyperliquid perpetual market list with metadata.

name: waiaas_hl_get_funding_rates
description: Get funding rate history for a Hyperliquid perpetual market.

name: waiaas_hl_get_account_state
description: Get Hyperliquid account state (balances, margins, positions).

name: waiaas_hl_get_trade_history
description: Get Hyperliquid trade history (fills) for a wallet.

name: waiaas_hl_get_spot_balances
description: Get Hyperliquid spot token balances for a wallet.

name: waiaas_hl_get_spot_markets
description: Get Hyperliquid spot market list (trading pairs, token info).

name: waiaas_hl_list_sub_accounts
description: List Hyperliquid sub-accounts for a wallet.

name: waiaas_hl_get_sub_positions
description: Get positions for a Hyperliquid sub-account.

name: waiaas_pm_get_positions
description: Get Polymarket prediction market positions for a wallet.

name: waiaas_pm_get_orders
description: Get Polymarket CLOB orders for a wallet.

name: waiaas_pm_get_markets
description: Browse Polymarket prediction markets with optional filters.

name: waiaas_pm_get_market_detail
description: Get detailed information about a specific Polymarket prediction market.

name: waiaas_pm_get_events
description: Get Polymarket events (groups of related markets).

name: waiaas_pm_get_balance
description: Get Polymarket USDC.e balance and CTF token positions for a wallet.

name: waiaas_pm_get_pnl
description: Get Polymarket profit and loss summary for a wallet.

name: waiaas_pm_setup
description: Set up Polymarket API keys and optional CTF contract approval for a wallet.
